LAW AND MOTION, 301, HEARING ON THE MOTION PROCEEDED. DEFENDANT, YASMIN HAMID IS SWORN AND EXAMINED. JENNY VALDEZ AND DEVON LEE ARE SWORN AND EXAMINED AS WITNESSES FOR PLAINTIFF. THE MATTER IS ARGUED AND THE PETITION FOR RELIEF FROM FORFEITURE IS DENIED. THERE IS NO UNUSUAL HARDSHIP BY THE DEFENDANT. C.C.P. 1179 ARE NOT MET. MISS HAMID IS TO PREPARE A STAY ORDER AND RENT TO BE PAID FOR ONE WEEK. THIS IS THE THIRD AND LAST STAY. ATTY. CREASON IS TO PREPARE AN ORDER DENYING THE PETITION FOR RELIEF FORM FORFEITURE. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189
RENT DEPOSIT TRUST RECEIPT # 19190 DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT HAMID, YASMIN
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-11-2007 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
